name: German tree cake
description: Aka one of the most labor-intensive cakes to make (traditionally made on a rotating spit).

ingredients.ingredient: orange blossom water (or almond extract - any flavoring will do)

step_sections.name: Process
steps: 2. Prepare springform pan: grease and line bottom with parchment, then grease and flour the sides
3. In a stand mixer, whisk butter, sugar, egg yolks, and vanilla
4. Warm the marzipan (to make it easier to whisk) and mix with rum until incorporated. Add to wet ingredients
6. Fold dry ingredients into batter until no lumps remain
7. In a clean bowl, whisk egg whites and salt to stiff peaks. Fold into batter until just combined
8. Spread 3 tbsp of batter in the pan and bake for 1 to 1.5 min until golden brown
9. Spread a thin layer of apricot jam
10. Repeat steps 8 and 9 until no batter remains
11. After the final layer is baked, remove from oven and let cool for 10 min. Release from springform pan and cool completely
12. Optional: Finish with chocolate glaze and almond decor
